prompt_text:
### Demographics: 78-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Despite repeated counseling on insulin need, the patient strongly refuses injections; shared decision was made to intensify oral therapy and reassess within 2-4 weeks.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Normal
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~3.8 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 54.3 kg; Height 163.9 cm; BMI 20.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/86 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.3%; 9 months ago 9.6%; 6 months ago 9.5%; 3 months ago 10.0%; current 10.0%), FPG (12 months ago 198mg/dL; 9 months ago 206mg/dL; 6 months ago 203mg/dL; 3 months ago 286mg/dL; current 300mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 56.3kg; 9 months ago 53.1kg; 6 months ago 54.7kg; 3 months ago 54.1kg; current 54.3kg), Height (12 months ago 163.9cm; 9 months ago 163.9cm; 6 months ago 163.9cm; 3 months ago 163.9cm; current 163.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 125mmHg; 6 months ago 124mmHg; 3 months ago 126mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 83mmHg; 9 months ago 82mmHg; 6 months ago 82mmHg; 3 months ago 82mmHg; current 86mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 27U/L; 9 months ago 35U/L; 6 months ago 35U/L; 3 months ago 27U/L; current 30U/L), AST (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 24U/L; 3 months ago 19U/L; current 21U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 32mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 33mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 32mL/min/1.73m²; current 32mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 95mg/g; 9 months ago 102mg/g; 6 months ago 112mg/g; 3 months ago 90mg/g; current 110mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 90mg/dL; 9 months ago 84mg/dL; 6 months ago 88mg/dL; 3 months ago 90mg/dL; current 87mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 52mg/dL; 9 months ago 49mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 48mg/dL; current 50mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 107mg/dL; 9 months ago 106mg/dL; 6 months ago 109mg/dL; 3 months ago 111mg/dL; current 117mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.9g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.84 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited. Strong injection refusal is documented; under shared decision-making, the patient accepts oral regimen adjustment with short-interval reassessment.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
